title: US CPI YoY, March 2026 release
question_text: What will the US headline CPI year-over-year figure be for the March 2026 release?
resolution_criteria: Resolves against the Bureau of Labor Statistics headline CPI year-over-year figure in the release published in April 2026.
resolution_source: US Bureau of Labor Statistics CPI release (bls.gov)
edge_cases: Uses the headline (not core) figure. First print only; later revisions are ignored.
